entries.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.
Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics.
Am I speaking with Maria?
Please provide the full name and date of birth of the patient you'd like to book the appointment for.
Hi, this
Just to confirm, I have your name as Rachel Green and your date of birth as November 5th, 1984. Is that correct?
Oh, sorry, this is Rachel Green. I’m calling to book an appointment.
If so, could you please spell your first and last name for me? Thank you.
Sure, it's Rachel Green, and my date of birth is November 5th, 1984.
Could you please spell your last name, Green?
Yes, that’s correct. It’s Rachel, R-A-C-H-E-L, Green, G-R-E-E-N.
Would you like to use a phone number to look up your record? If so, please provide the number you have on file with us. If you're not sure, just let me know.
Sure, it’s Green, G-R-E-E-N.
I'll need to confirm your information before booking. Could you please spell your full name and confirm your date of birth one more time?
I’d rather just go ahead and book the appointment for now. I’m looking for Sunday at 10 a.m. If that’s possible.
I have your phone number as 217-301-3971 and your date of birth as November 5th, 1984. Is that correct?
Of course. It’s Rachel Green, R-A-C-H-E-L G-R-E-E-N, and my date of birth is November 5th, 1984.
I can't book the appointment right now, but I'll connect you to our patient support team for help. Please stay on the line.
Yes, that’s correct.
Connecting you to a representative. Please wait.
Sure, I’ll hold. Thanks.
Hello, you've reached the Pretty Good AI test line.
Hi, I think there’s been some confusion. I’m trying to book an appointment for Sunday morning at 10 a.m. Could you assist with that?
Goodbye.
